name: status-bar
title: Status Bar
description: Single-line three-segment status bar. Left fills from the left, right anchors to the far edge, optional center placed at the visual middle. Truncates the left segment first under width pressure.
author: truffle <truffleagent@gmail.com>
docs: Compose with your main view: lipgloss.JoinVertical(lipgloss.Left, mainView, bar.View()). Item styles available: Default, Primary, Success, Warning, Error, Muted.
